raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Individuals found mentally incompetent to stand trial are banned from buying or owning firearms until their rights are restored.",
    "California has had more than 12,000 gun homicides since 2014.",
    "People in the United States are 25 times more likely to be killed in a gun homicide than those living in other developed countries.",
    "A loophole in state law prevents individuals deemed mentally incompetent in misdemeanor cases from having their mental incompetency reported to the Department of Justice.",
    "People suffering from severely debilitating mental illnesses pose a serious threat to themselves and others if they have access to firearms."
  ]
}
```
